summary: M7-VISUAL-UX-HANDOFF-001 is CLOSED after PR #171 entered origin/main. The accepted handoff may drive downstream M7 UI/localization planning tasks, with systems and QA conditions inherited, but does not authorize UI implementation by itself.

tests_run.result: Quality, Web, and Browser Smoke passed; Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact passed.
PR #171 merged and local main fast-forwarded to c5750d18ebac2bfec9cab42a1b7a20a10a526691.
Next READY task after integration is M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001.

decisions.decision: Close M7-VISUAL-UX-HANDOFF-001 after accepted visual, systems, QA, and lead handoffs entered main through PR #171.

Downstream M7 UI/localization tasks must preserve i18n outside sim-core, read-model/GameCommand authority, Pixi render-cache-only, player/debug separation, full Human Gate inheritance, DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE, and the zh-CN/zh-Hans locale-code risk as an explicit i18n task concern.

risks.summary: Product directive uses zh-CN while existing coverage may use zh-Hans; downstream i18n task must select or alias locale identifiers through systems review and tests.
Visual target-expression guidance must not be read as new domain-system authorization.

requested_action: Create or update downstream M7 UI/localization quality-track tasks in a planning task before implementation, then continue M7 READY work.
